_comment: Phase 5 semantic-tag calibration fixture set.  Used by `semantic-tag-calibration.mjs` to compare candidate thresholds against curated 'should accept' / 'should reject' pairs.  Add to this file as new precision/recall failure modes are observed; each entry exercises one (axis, evidence, expected) triple.  `axis` is `topics` or `keywords`; `expectedAccept` lists labels that ought to clear threshold for the given settings vocabulary; `expectedReject` lists labels that must NOT clear threshold even though they're in the settings list.  Geographies are intentionally not in scope — Phase 5 keeps the deterministic-only lock.

cases.evidence: Petroleum prices climbed as refining capacity tightened across the Gulf Coast.
Crude inventories drew sharply this week, supporting prices.
Treasury weighs an expansion of sanctions on the Colombian leadership circle.
ICE announced the removal of 220 migrants on flights to Bogota.
The ceremony unfolded under heavy rain and was attended by senior officials.
High-stakes talks resumed in the capital, focused on bilateral economic ties.
A new asylum-processing accord widens the bilateral migration corridor.
Joint border patrols continued through the weekend amid regional tensions.
The local food festival drew record crowds, organizers said.
